strengths: 15+ years of hands-on engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform demonstrating entrepreneurial initiative
Active contributor to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at current role
concerns: Current title is Senior/Staff, not Principal or Director-level IC
Limited demonstrated track record of shipped AI/ML products or platforms
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in an AI-related field

key_factors.factor: Breadth of engineering experience and tenure

response.justification: The candidate brings strong, broad engineering experience with full-stack, infrastructure, and emerging AI-agent tooling work, plus founder experience through GISCollective. However, the role targets a Director-level IC with recognized AI expertise and shipped AI products at scale, and the resume shows recent rather than deep AI/ML platform leadership, with no advanced AI degree and prior titles below Principal level.
